title: Diabetes Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ant and have gestational diabetes, you may also need to monitor your glucose levels in this way.
People with type 2 diabetes must also check their blood sugar regularly. If you have type 2 diabetes, talk to your provider about how often it should be checked.
People with type 2 diabetes may also need to have their insulin levels checked regularly. Insulin plays a key role in keeping glucose at the right levels. An insulin in blood Â test is done at a provider's office.
